ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_number" INTEGER /* Number assigned to the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "school" TEXT /* School or organization the team represents */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "coach_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the team coach */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, sponsor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the competition round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition round */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the competition round */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the competition round */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the metrics belong to */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition round */,
  "opr" REAL /* Overall Performance Rating (OPR) of the team */,
  "cargo_side_panel" REAL /* Score for placing panels in the cargo side zone */,
  "cargo_side_cargo" REAL /* Score for placing cargo in the cargo side zone */,
  "cargo_front_panel" REAL /* Score for placing panels in the cargo front zone */,
  "cargo_front_cargo" REAL /* Score for placing cargo in the cargo front zone */,
  "rocket_high_panel" REAL /* Score for placing panels in the rocket high zone */,
  "rocket_high_cargo" REAL /* Score for placing cargo in the rocket high zone */,
  "rocket_mid_panel" REAL /* Score for placing panels in the rocket mid zone */,
  "rocket_mid_cargo" REAL /* Score for placing cargo in the rocket mid zone */,
  "rocket_low_panel" REAL /* Score for placing panels in the rocket low zone */,
  "rocket_low_cargo" REAL /* Score for placing cargo in the rocket low zone */,
  "starting_avg" REAL /* Average starting performance of the team */,
  "climbing_avg" REAL /* Average climbing performance of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rounds" (
  "team_round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-round entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition round */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team-round entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team-round entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rounds_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rounds_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
